ingredients_text: Pulses (60 %) (Red split lentils - Brown lentils Green split peas Yellow split peas) Pearl barley (40 %).

Chicken (64%), BBQ marinade (29%) (Sugar, Worcestershire sauce [Water, Vinegar, Molasses, Sugar, Salt, Spice oils & Extracts {Clove, Ginger, Celery, Black pepper, Capsicum} Starch, Colourant], Tomato paste, Spirit vinegar, Water, BBQ seasoning [Salt, Sugar, Paprika, Garlic, Coriander, Onion, Red bell pepper, Cumin, Thyme, Smoke flavour, Lemon juice powder {Maltodextrin, Lemon juice}, Yeast extract, Anticaking agent, Paprika extract], Garlic, Starch, Salt, Ginger, Stabiliser, Irradiated black pepper), Savoury brine (7%) (Water, Vegetable oil [Canola oil], Salt, Phosphates, Stabilisers, Sugar, Celery extract, Emulsifier).
Wholewheat (90%) (Couscous), Garlic and Onion Spice Kit (10%) (Onion (2%), Salt, Parsley, Garlic Powder (1%)).

Roast Vegetables (36%) [Baby Marrow, Mushrooms, Cauliflower, Broccoli]; Chicken (27%) [Chicken, Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Kalahari Salt]; Hotpot Sauce (20%) [Water, Tomatoes, Beetroot, Apple, Sweet Potato, Sun-Dried Tomatoes, Onions, Celery, Carrots, Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Kalahari Salt, Oregano, Black Pepper, Garlic]; Quinoa (17%) [Quinoa, Kalahari Salt].

Beef Bolognese (33%) [Extra Lean Beef Mince (28%), tomatoes, Onion, Apple, Sweet Potato, Lemon Juice, Beetroot, Carrots, Celery, Sundried Tomatoes, Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Cream, Garlic, Kalahari Salt, Tapioca, Ground Black Pepper, Oreganum, Basil]; Béchamel Sauce (27%) [Full Cream Milk, Cream, Butter, Whole-Wheat Flour, Kalahari Salt, Black Pepper] Tomato Concasse (20%)  [Tomatoes, Onion, Apple, Carrots, Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Beetroot, Tapioca, Kalahari Salt, Garlic, Black Pepper); Spinach Pasta Sheets (13%) [Durum Wheat Semolina, Soft Wheat Semolina, Egg, Water, Spinach]; Mozzarella Cheese (7%).
